retrieved_docs.title: North Atlantic Treaty
retrieved_docs.content: The North Atlantic Treaty established NATO as a collective defense alliance among member states.

retrieved_docs.title: NATO Article 5
retrieved_docs.content: Article 5 states that an armed attack against one NATO ally is treated as an attack against all allies.

retrieved_docs.title: NATO
retrieved_docs.content: NATO stands for the North Atlantic Treaty Organization. It is a political and military alliance founded in 1949.
